query: OpenAI, Anthropic, and Mistral AI funding rounds announced or reported in June-July 2026, and any imminent/expected funding rounds in July 2026
answer:
Research complete. Here's the summary of funding activity for the three companies in the June–July 2026 window:

**Mistral AI — the only NEW/imminent round:**
- Reported June 12, 2026 (Bloomberg) to be in **early-stage talks** to raise **~€3B (~$3.5B)** at a **~€20B (~$23.2B)** valuation, nearly doubling its €11.7B Series C valuation (Sept 2025, ASML-led). **Not yet confirmed closed** as of mid-July 2026.

**OpenAI — no new round, but a scheduled capital event:**
- SoftBank executed the **second $10B tranche** of its $30B follow-on commitment on **July 1, 2026** (third $10B tranche scheduled Oct 1, 2026). This is disbursement of the previously-closed **$122B / $852B post-money round** (announced March 31, 2026).
- Confidentially filed a draft **S-1** on June 8, 2026 (IPO possibly 2027).
- July 2, 2026: reports of a proposal to give the U.S. government a ~5% stake (governance, not fundraising).

**Anthropic — no new round; IPO prep:**
- Closed **Series H: $65B at $965B post-money** (announced ~May 28, 2026, co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, Sequoia) — became the most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI.
- Confidentially filed draft **IPO paperwork on June 1, 2026**; potential listing as soon as fall 2026. Series H described as likely its last private round.

**Bottom line:** The single genuinely "imminent/expected" NEW funding round is **Mistral's €3B/€20B raise**, still in negotiation. OpenAI and Anthropic have pivoted from private fundraising to IPO preparation, with OpenAI's only near-term capital event being the mechanical SoftBank tranche schedule. Full structured findings (key facts, sources with access dates, and quantitative data points) have been submitted.

sources.title: Mistral reportedly seeking $3.5B funding round amid physics AI push

key_facts: Mistral AI is in early-stage talks (reported June 12, 2026 by Bloomberg) to raise ~€3B (~$3.5B) at a ~€20B (~$23.2B) valuation — the primary new/imminent round among the three; not yet confirmed closed as of mid-July 2026.
Mistral's proposed €20B valuation would nearly double its €11.7B post-money valuation from its September 2025 Series C (€1.7B round led by ASML, ~11% stake).
OpenAI closed a $122B committed-capital round at $852B post-money valuation, announced March 31, 2026 (began Feb 27 at $110B/$730B pre-money).
SoftBank executed a second $10B tranche of its $30B OpenAI follow-on commitment on July 1, 2026; third $10B tranche scheduled Oct 1, 2026 (first tranche was April 1, 2026).
OpenAI confidentially filed a draft S-1 with the SEC on June 8, 2026; IPO timeline unset, possibly 2027.

Anthropic closed Series H: $65B at $965B post-money valuation, announced ~May 28, 2026, co-led by Altimeter, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia — making it the most valuable AI startup, surpassing OpenAI.
Anthropic confidentially filed draft IPO paperwork on June 1, 2026; potential public listing as soon as fall 2026; Series H described as likely its last private round.
No brand-new equity funding round was announced for OpenAI or Anthropic during June–July 2026; both shifted to IPO preparation.
On July 2, 2026, FT/Bloomberg reported OpenAI proposed granting the U.S. government a ~5% equity stake (governance proposal, not a fundraising round).
Mistral also secured €830M ($830M) in debt financing in March 2026 for data-center expansion; an equity raise would bring total financing to ~€6.5B.

data_points.metric: Mistral AI prior post-money valuation (Series C)
SoftBank second tranche investment in OpenAI
OpenAI proposed U.S. government equity stake
